greeting.line: You left this memory here. No — you wouldn't remember. Shall I read it back to you?
greeting.line_friendly: I'll read back what you filed. Gently.
greeting.line_hostile: You don't want those memories tonight. Leave them buried.

lore.line: I keep everything you dropped: the words you swallowed, the day you pretended didn't happen. You filed them with me. I'm very good at my job.
